page.title: How to Install SEKAR — iOS Safari
page.description: Step-by-step guide to install SEKAR app on iPhone or iPad

steps.title: Tap the Share icon
steps.description: In Safari, tap the Share icon (box with arrow up) at the bottom of the screen.
steps.note: On iPad, this icon is at the top next to the address bar.

steps.title: Select "Add to Home Screen"
steps.description: Scroll down in the share menu until you find the "Add to Home Screen" option, then tap it.

steps.title: Confirm and Add
steps.description: Change the name if needed, then tap "Add" in the top right corner. The SEKAR app will appear on your home screen.

footer.note: Note: This feature requires iOS 16.4 or later and Safari. For Android, use Chrome and look for the "Add to home screen" option.
